data.title: North America Water Pump Market Forecast to Reach USD 15 Billion by 2032, Reports MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: On March 28, 2026, a market study by MarkNtel Advisors revealed projections for the North America Water Pump Market, estimating a growth of approximately 3.93% at a compound annual growth rate between 2026 and 2032. This expansion is largely due to rising investments in water infrastructure and related sectors.

data.title: UK Soft Gelatin Capsules Market to Reach USD 408.07 Million by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 5.8% During 2026-2032 | MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by MarkNtel Advisors predicts that the Soft Gelatin Capsules Market in the United Kingdom will experience a growth rate of 5.8% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is largely attributed to the rising demand for these capsules.

data.title: Dual Imaging Identifies Cause of Heart Attack in Patients Without Blocked Arteries
data.description: A study led by NYU Langone and presented at ACC.26 advocates for utilizing advanced imaging techniques to improve diagnosis and treatment. The research involved a patient named Ashley Perlow, who experienced a sudden intense pain in her chest and wrists. The study emphasizes the importance of combining advanced imaging tools for better patient care. This initiative highlights the potential benefits of integrating imaging technologies in healthcare, emphasizing the value of comprehensive diagnostic approaches. The study was showcased at ACC.26 on March 28, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Nestlé/
data.description: In a recent news update, it was disclosed that a significant theft has occurred involving a whopping 12 tonnes of KITKAT chocolate bars. The incident took place as reported on 27-Mar-2026, invoking concerns raised by Nestlé, the company affected by this massive loss. According to the company, this theft may have critical ramifications, potentially resulting in a scarcity of supplies just before the upcoming Easter season. Nestlé has officially verified the occurrence of the theft and is currently assessing the impact on their operations.

data.title: Brazil Plant-Based Dairy Market to Reach USD 215 Million by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Dairy Alternatives and Expanding Retail Presence| Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: On March 28, 2026, a recent report by Vyansa Intelligence revealed that the Brazil Plant-Based Dairy Market is anticipated to experience a steady growth rate, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 5.79% from 2026 to 2032. This growth is largely attributed to the rising interest among consumers in plant-based alternatives.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Dives As Oil Prices Hit $100 In Iran War; What To Do Now
data.description: Market indexes experienced significant declines, dropping to their lowest levels in the past six months amidst rising oil prices nearing $100 due to escalating tensions in Iran. The focus now shifts to the upcoming Tesla deliveries. For further insights on how to navigate this market situation, stay updated on the latest trends and analysis.

data.title: Alumis’ Envudeucitinib Delivers Early and Robust Improvements in Skin Clearance, Quality of Life and Psoriasis Symptoms in Two Phase 3 Trials, Underscoring Its Potential as a Leading Oral Therapy for Plaque Psoriasis
data.description: Late-breaking data presented at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) conference highlighted significant advancements in the treatment of psoriasis with Envudeucitinib. Results from two Phase 3 trials demonstrated early and substantial enhancements in skin clearance, quality of life, and relief from psoriasis symptoms. The findings underscored a notable improvement in symptoms and quality of life for patients with psoriasis, showcasing promising outcomes with Envudeucitinib. This development marks a critical step in addressing the unmet medical needs of individuals suffering from psoriasis, with the potential to offer relief to a significant number of patients.

data.title: US District Court in Southern NY rules in Trizetto re-trial, significant outcome.
data.description: A new study examining the impact of climate change reveals alarming statistics. The research indicates that global temperatures have risen by 1.2 degrees Celsius since pre-industrial times. Furthermore, the study projects a potential increase of 3 degrees Celsius by the end of the century if current trends continue. The data shows that sea levels have already risen by 8 inches since 1880 and could surge an additional 1-4 feet by 2100. The study emphasizes the urgent need for immediate action to mitigate these effects and prevent further escalation of climate change.

data.title: Tim Draper On Bitcoin And The Future Of The Financial System: 'After The Automobile, People Still Ride Horses For A While'
data.description: Renowned venture capitalist Tim Draper believes the future of banking is undergoing a transformation comparable to the shift from horses to automobiles. Drawing parallels with historical innovation patterns, Draper predicts that AI will play a pivotal role in reshaping banking services. Despite advancements in AI technology, experts note that the fintech industry is still in the early stages of integration, with companies like JPMorgan Chase & Co., Goldman Sachs Group Inc., and Bank of America Corp. incorporating AI tools. This insight was revealed during a gathering at Benzinga's Fintech Day and Awards in November 2025. Draper's stance underscores the coexistence of old and new systems in the financial sector, emphasizing the benefits of embracing innovation. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Data from Phase 2b REZOLVE-AD and REZOLVE-AA Studies of Rezpegaldesleukin Presented at 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting
data.description: Results from a recent study show that Rezpegaldesleukin has led to a significant increase in mean percent Eczema Area and Severity Index (EASI) improvement in patients with moderate and severe atopic dermatitis. Additionally, proof-of-concept data for Rezpegaldesleukin in alopecia areata patients was shared in a late-breaking research oral presentation at the SAN event. The findings suggest promising outcomes for both conditions.

data.title: PureHealth Research reports Why Targeted Supplements for Hearing Loss May Be Your Ears' Best Defense
data.description: In Manassas, Virginia, on March 28, 2026, PureHealth Research revealed that auditory decline impacts millions of adults. The initial symptoms are subtle including muffled conversations, persistent ringing, and an increase in TV volume over time. The study highlights the prevalence of this issue and ongoing research efforts to address it.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Sell-Off Breaking Hearts As Oil Prices Hit $100 In Iran War; What To Do Now
data.description: The stock market plunged to six-month lows with major indexes experiencing a sell-off as oil prices surged close to $100 due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Investors are keeping a close eye on upcoming Tesla deliveries. The situation has led to uncertainty and concern among traders. It is essential for investors to carefully consider their next steps during these turbulent market conditions.

data.title: Bank of America to pay $72.5M in settlement for lawsuit by Epstein victims, alleging it overlooked signs of abuse facilitation.
data.description: The lawsuit alleged that the bank failed to notice indications that Mr. Epstein's accounts were being utilized to facilitate his exploitation of young women.

data.title: GameStop utilized $315M in Bitcoin for a covered call options strategy on Coinbase Prime, aiming to generate yield.
data.description: GameStop has decided to commit most of its Bitcoin holdings to a covered-call strategy on Coinbase Prime in order to generate returns. This move demonstrates GameStop's willingness to take advantage of its crypto assets to potentially earn profits.

data.title: CANADABIS ANNOUNCES DELAY IN FILING OF SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL STATEMENTS
data.description: CanadaBis Capital Inc. (TSXV: CANB) based in Calgary, AB, has announced a delay in filing its unaudited interim financial statements, management's discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the three months ended January 31, 2026. These filings were due by March 31, 2026. The delay is a result of resource constraints within the company and efforts to enhance financial management and reporting processes. Updates on the situation will be shared as they unfold. The full story is accessible through Benzinga.com.
